## LibraryRuntime.ProducedRolledTruffle class

Mutable wrapper for IProducedRolledTruffle with undo/redo support. Provides rolled truffle-specific editing methods.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ProducedRolledTruffle extends ProducedConfectionBase<IProducedRolledTruffleEntity> 
```
**Extends:** [ProducedConfectionBase](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.producedconfectionbase.md)<!-- -->&lt;[IProducedRolledTruffleEntity](./ts-chocolate.entities.iproducedrolledtruffleentity.md)<!-- -->&gt;
